ice_config_t(3) Library Functions Manual ice_config_t(3)

NAME

ice_config_t - ICE gathering configuration.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/webrtc/ice.h>

Data Fields


const char * ufrag
Username fragment for ICE (from offer). const char * pwd
Password for ICE (from offer). ice_send_candidate_callback_t send_callback
Called for each gathered candidate. void * user_data
Passed to callback.

Detailed Description

ICE gathering configuration.

Definition at line 157 of file ice.h.
